# Central African Republic Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Central African Republic's administrative hierarchy:
> 20 prefectures, 85 sub-prefectures, 170 communes.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total prefectures: 20
- Total sub-prefectures: 85
- Total communes: 170
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-06-01
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All prefectures (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-prefecture.json)
- [All sub-prefectures (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-sub_prefecture.json)
- [All communes (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-commune.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Prefecture

- [Lobaye](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/lobaye-cf12/) — 6 sub-prefectures, 14 communes
- [Nana-Mambéré](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nana-mambr-cf22/) — 4 sub-prefectures, 17 communes
- [Ouham](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ouham-cf32/) — 4 sub-prefectures, 6 communes
- [Ouham-Fafa](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ouham-fafa-cf33/) — 4 sub-prefectures, 12 communes
- [Kémo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kmo-cf41/) — 4 sub-prefectures, 6 communes
- [Lim-pendé](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/lim-pend-cf34/) — 5 sub-prefectures, 14 communes
- [Ouham Pendé](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ouham-pend-cf31/) — 4 sub-prefectures, 9 communes
- [Sangha-Mbaéré](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sangha-mbar-cf23/) — 3 sub-prefectures, 7 communes
- [Vakaga](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/vakaga-cf53/) — 4 sub-prefectures, 2 communes
- [Bamingui-Bangoran](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bamingui-bangoran-cf51/) — 2 sub-prefectures, 4 communes
- [Mbomou](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mbomou-cf62/) — 5 sub-prefectures, 10 communes
- [Ombella M&#39;Poko](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ombella-mpoko-cf11/) — 5 sub-prefectures, 5 communes
- [Basse-Kotto](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/basse-kotto-cf61/) — 6 sub-prefectures, 15 communes
- [Haute-Kotto](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/haute-kotto-cf52/) — 4 sub-prefectures, 10 communes
- [Mambéré-Kadéï](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mambr-kad-cf21/) — 4 sub-prefectures, 6 communes
- [Mambéré](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mambr-cf24/) — 4 sub-prefectures, 4 communes
- [Haut-Mbomou](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/haut-mbomou-cf63/) — 5 sub-prefectures, 5 communes
- [Nana-Gribizi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nana-gribizi-cf42/) — 3 sub-prefectures, 3 communes
- [Ouaka](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ouaka-cf43/) — 5 sub-prefectures, 13 communes
- [Bangui](https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bangui-cf71/) — 4 sub-prefectures, 8 communes

- [Ombella M&#39;Poko](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/ombella-mpoko-cf11.txt)

- [Mambéré-Kadéï](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/mambr-kad-cf21.txt)
- [Mambéré](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/mambr-cf24.txt)
- [Haut-Mbomou](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/haut-mbomou-cf63.txt)
- [Nana-Gribizi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/nana-gribizi-cf42.txt)
- [Ouaka](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/ouaka-cf43.txt)
- [Bangui](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/bangui-cf71.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (prefecture), 2 (sub-prefecture), 3 (commune)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Central African Republic Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/central-african-republic-administrative-divisions

- [ListBase](https://www.listbase.org) — Structured reference data for every country
